name: ClassicCounter Community Sticker Capsule #1
description: This capsule contains old stickers that aren't normally available in Sticker Capsules. It was made to be able to receive them by playing on ClassicCounter servers.

name: ClassicCounter Community Sticker Capsule #2
description: This capsule contains new custom stickers that were made for ClassicCounter. These are not original designs.

name: Community Sticker Capsule 1
description: This capsule contains a single community-designed sticker. A portion of the proceeds is shared equally among the included creators.
